privacy_intro: At Marketplace-Residencia, we protect your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy_data_collection: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, address) and data about your site usage (cookies, IP address). We also collect transaction information and browsing preferences to improve your experience.
privacy_data_usage: We use your information to process orders, send confirmations, improve our services, personalize your experience, and comply with legal obligations. We never sell your data to third parties without your consent.
privacy_data_security: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access. However, no system is completely secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy_cookies: We use cookies to remember your preferences and improve your experience. You can control cookies in your browser options. Cookies necessary for the site's operation cannot be disabled.
privacy_rights: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, contact us at support@marketplace-residencia.com.
privacy_contact: If you have questions about this policy, email us at privacy@marketplace-residencia.com.
terms_intro: By using Marketplace-Residencia, you accept these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before making any purchase.
terms_use: You agree to use this site only for lawful purposes and not for activities that violate applicable laws. You will not attempt to hack, interfere with the site's operation, or collect data without authorization.
terms_products: Products are sold as described. Prices are in MXN unless otherwise specified. We reserve the right to correct price errors. Prices are subject to change without notice.
terms_orders: When you make a purchase, you agree to pay the total amount including taxes and shipping. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order without reason. Payment must be processed successfully before we send your order.
terms_returns: Products can be returned within 30 days from the delivery date if they are in original condition and unused. To initiate a return, contact our support team.
terms_liability: Marketplace-Residencia is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the product.
terms_contact: For questions about these terms, contact legal@marketplace-residencia.com.
shipping_policy_intro: We are committed to delivering your orders safely and on time. This policy explains our shipping methods and terms.
shipping_methods: We offer shipping via FedEx and Easyship nationally and internationally. During checkout, you will see available options for your delivery address with estimated times and costs.
shipping_processing: Orders are processed within 1-2 business days after payment confirmation. You will receive an email with a tracking number when your package is sent.
shipping_domestic: We offer shipping throughout the country with delivery times of 3-7 business days depending on your location. Shipping is insured.
shipping_international: We ship to multiple countries with delivery times of 7-21 business days. The customer is responsible for import duties and taxes.
shipping_tracking: You can track your shipment using the tracking number you receive via email. Log into your account to see the status of your orders.
shipping_damaged: If you receive a damaged package, report the issue within 48 hours. We will take a photo and process a replacement or refund.
returns_policy_intro: We want you to be satisfied with your purchase. If you're not, we offer a simple returns process.
returns_window: You have 30 days from the delivery date to initiate a return. Products must be in original condition, unused, with all tags intact.
returns_process: Contact our support team at returns@marketplace-residencia.com with your order number. We will provide return shipping instructions. Once received and inspected, we will process your refund within 5-7 business days.
returns_non_returnable: Some items like opened alcohol or personalized products cannot be returned. Check the product description before purchasing.
returns_refund: Refunds are processed to your original payment method. Refunds will appear in your account within 3-5 business days after processing.
returns_exchange: If you want to exchange a product for another, the process is similar to returns. We will cover the return shipping cost if the exchange is due to a manufacturing defect.
returns_contact: To initiate a return, contact returns@marketplace-residencia.com.
alcohol_disclaimer_intro: Marketplace-Residencia sells alcoholic beverages. By making a purchase, you confirm that you understand and accept our alcohol-related terms.
alcohol_age_requirement: You must be 18 years or older to purchase alcoholic beverages in Mexico. By completing your purchase, you certify that you are of legal drinking age. We reserve the right to verify your identity.
alcohol_legal: All our products comply with Mexican regulations and standards, including NOM-070 for distilled spirits. Products are marketed only for legal consumption.
alcohol_health_warning: Alcohol consumption can be dangerous to your health if consumed in excess. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, or have health problems, consult a doctor before consuming alcohol.
alcohol_responsible: Drink responsibly. Do not drive or operate heavy machinery under the influence of alcohol. Call a taxi or designate a driver.
alcohol_shipping: The shipping of alcoholic beverages is regulated in many regions. Additional restrictions may apply. We will confirm shipping availability to your address during checkout.
alcohol_contact: For questions about our alcohol products, contact info@marketplace-residencia.com.
